[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A mobile game or social app screen shows user profile elements, a chat-style text block, and a blue notification bar over a blurred dark background image.

Main Subject:
The main focus is the app interface, including a top row with a circular user avatar and labels, a mid section with another user entry and text, and a large blue horizontal banner that reads “3 Hari Premium” with a “Klaim” button on the right.

Setting:
This appears to be an indoor, screen-captured smartphone interface. The background behind the UI is dark and blurred, with faint figures or game-like visuals in the lower area, but the exact scene is unclear. Lighting is consistent with a digital display.

Visual Details:
At the top left, there is a date-like text “14.01” in light gray. Along the top right are small network or status icons and numbers in white and gray text. Near the top center-left is a circular avatar with light green hair and anime-style artwork, followed by a username line that includes “#5470843”. Next to it are a purple tag-shaped label reading “KISU” and a green pill-shaped label that includes “Lvl. 4.925”. Beneath that, there is another circular avatar with a pinkish/red-toned anime-style face and the text “Treeky x tempest” with a small checkmark icon. To the right of that line is “7 menit lalu” and a grayish label that includes “Lvl. 40.669”. There is also a blue label reading “30D TOP 100”. A small hashtag-like text “#1033922” appears below that section.
A larger content area includes a small thumbnail image and the text “Dragon Ball: Super Episode 11”. Under it, there is a longer chat message in white text: “yg dari clan lain jangan Cepu ya 😡😡,ini khusus My clan”. The blue banner near the bottom includes a white crown icon on the left, then “3 Hari Premium” in white, and below it “Tersisa 45 dari 50” in smaller white text. On the right side of the banner is a rounded white button with the blue text “Klaim”. At the bottom edge there is a small line reading “25 Replies” in bluish text, and a yellow/orange pill label reading “Legendary”.

The image shows a screenshot of a mobile app or game interface with user profile items and a chat or post area. It also displays a promotional banner for “3 Hari Premium” with a “Klaim” claim button.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
